title: Tricalysia wernhamiana
taxonomy: Tricalysia wernhamiana belongs to the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. This family includes over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species, making it one of the largest families of flowering plants. Tricalysia wernhamiana is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The genus Tricalysia is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. The classification of Tricalysia wernhamiana is further divided into the subfamily Cinchonoideae, which is a subfamily of Rubiaceae.
